sprint_goal: Build a cinematic homepage concept as an open-book pitch. Trigger an Instagram outreach conversation.
deliverables: DONE: Spatial Story / Section Map (WWP Aligned)
DONE: Design System (Tokens, Typography, GSAP easings)
DONE: Hero Section Execution (Staggered Strips Transition & Real Image Scraping)
PENDING: Hero Section Polish (Typography, Glassmorphism, Layout)

key_findings: Extracted 4 high-res real project images directly from xbdesign.com.
Hand-coded the XBD interlocking infinity logo as a crisp SVG.
Experimented with GSAP Z-Axis Push and Radial Wipers, ultimately pivoting to Staggered Vertical Strips.
Saved the performant CSS `mask-image` stagger technique as a permanent reference.

notes: NEXT SESSION INSTRUCTIONS: 1. Polish the Hero Section typography, layouts, and add glassmorphism effects. 2. Implement the Opening Sequence / Loader. 3. Look into Seedance 2.0 AI Video generation for the hero assets to replace static images with cinematic motion.
key_decisions: Concept 2 (Continuous Push) was replaced with Staggered Structural Columns (Vertical Blinds) to better align with the architectural brand identity.
Used CSS `mask-image` with GSAP to stagger vertical columns without duplicating DOM elements.
Do not wipe horizontally over text—it creates a broken bar-chart effect.
